productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Iceland Grey Casual Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these casual shoes from the united colors of benetton will add an extra bounce to your steps. Motor-Sports inspired, these nubuck leather shoes are light-weight, and look perfect with rugged jeans. Hang out with the cool gang in them, and you will easily become the coolest member of the group! Look stylish and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Nubuck leather upper with overlays on the forefoot, around the central lacing system and behind the collar for added durability and style Contrast strips on either side and patch behind collar for added attraction Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Well padded tongue and mildly cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Big Ben logo on tongue Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Mesh lining for better ventilation and added comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Grooves all over the outsole for improved traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
